ideation: This animation sequence aims to convey the gentle, protective posture often associated with pregnancy.  The animation will focus on a slight cradling motion of the hands over the abdomen.  The robot's lack of hands necessitates using the arms to create the implication of gentle support. The sequence will use a slow, deliberate pace to reflect the weight and significance of the gesture. The right arm will remain relatively static, providing a counterpoint to the left arm's movement. Frame 1 will start with both arms at the sides, then move to gently cradling the abdomen, then return to a resting position.  The left arm will do most of the movement. This is a sensitive emoji, so I want the movement to be gentle and unassuming.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at the sides
left arm gently cradles the belly, right arm rests
both arms return to a relaxed, resting pose
